Actions.Text: REFERRED TO CIVIL SERVICE AND PENSIONS

Title: Establishes language-specific civil service titles for customer-facing roles in state and local agencies
Summary: Establishes language-specific variants of existing customer-facing titles where high-need language thresholds are met.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the civil service law, in relation to establishing language-specific civil service titles for customer-facing roles in state and local agencies
